reference: I have benign prostatic hyperplasia with frequent urination, especially at night. I am fifty-nine years old and have been suffering for the last two years. I have been advised to undergo surgery, but I am not interested. I have been taking allopathic medicine for high blood pressure for the last twenty years. I tried Ayurvedic medicine for benign prostatic hyperplasia with no improvement. My name is Skh Babu, I am from Mysore, I am fifty-nine years old, five point six feet tall, and weigh sixty kilograms.
text: I have benign prostatic hyperplasia with frequent urination, especially at night. I am fifty-nine years old and have been suffering for the last two years. I have been advised to undergo surgery, but I am not interested. I have been taking allopatic medicine for high blood pressure for the last twenty years. I tried Iovade medicine for benign prostatic hyperplasia with no improvements. My name is Skarsvadov. I am from Mysoar. I am fifty-nine years old, five point six feet tall, and weigh sixty kilograms.
